nodes.label: line_color
nodes.description: LinearColor property - The vector view line color

nodes.label: line_thickness
nodes.description: float property - The vector view line thickness

nodes.label: hardware_device_identifier
nodes.description: Name property - The name of this hardware device

nodes.label: input_class_name
nodes.description: Name property - The name of the Input Class that uses this hardware device

nodes.label: primary_device_type
nodes.description: HardwareDevicePrimaryType property - The generic type that this hardware identifies as

nodes.label: supported_features_mask
nodes.description: int32 property - Flags that represent this hardware device's traits

nodes.label: WORLD
nodes.description: Sends traces from the world location and orientation of the interaction component

nodes.label: MOUSE
nodes.description: Sends traces from the mouse location of the first local player controller

nodes.label: CENTER_SCREEN
nodes.description: Sends trace from the center of the first local player's screen

nodes.label: CUSTOM
nodes.description: Sends traces from a custom location determined by the user

nodes.label: format_description
nodes.description: Array[str] property - Description of the export format

nodes.label: format_extension
nodes.description: Array[str] property - File extension to use for this exporter

nodes.label: supported_class
nodes.description: type(Class) property - Supported class of this exporter

nodes.label: text
nodes.description: bool property - If true, this will export the data as text

nodes.label: update_playable_remote_control_values
nodes.description: Injects the remote control values from current transition for the current playable

nodes.label: set_playable_hidden
nodes.description: Sets the hidden state of all primitives under this playable

nodes.label: is_playable_hidden
nodes.description: Returns the current hidden state of this playable

nodes.label: ORDERED
nodes.description: Will create pairs based on original point order

nodes.label: RANDOM
nodes.description: Will generate a random ordering that will drive pair order creation

nodes.label: MIN_ATTRIBUTE
nodes.description: Will create pairs according to attribute value order (minimum value first)

nodes.label: MAX_ATTRIBUTE
nodes.description: Will create pairs according to attribute value order (maximum value first)

hyperedges.description: DCPNodeHightLightParam belongs to WdpAssetAPI plugin, DcpAPI module, defined in DCPNodeAPIParams.h
SampledSequenceVectorViewerStyle belongs to AudioWidgets plugin and module
EarthControlActor belongs to AesWorld plugin, EarthControl module
ActorModifierCoreDisableReason belongs to ActorModifierCore plugin and module
DMMaterialStageExpressionParticleColor belongs to DynamicMaterial plugin, DynamicMaterialEditor module
MovieSceneNiagaraSystemTrack belongs to Niagara plugin and module
IKRigGoalPreviewMode belongs to IKRig plugin and module
MotionDesignPlayableLibrary belongs to Avalanche plugin, AvalancheMedia module
AvaShapeMaterialUVParameters belongs to Avalanche plugin, AvalancheShapes module
RigPhysicsSolverID belongs to ControlRig plugin and module
DatasmithAreaLightActor belongs to DatasmithContent plugin and module
PCGCollapseVisitOrder belongs to PCG plugin and module
EarthControlActor has Earth and camera-related properties
